technical.lead: Google Cloud Next '26 splits the 8th-gen TPU into "training" and "inference" SKUs (2026-04-22)
technical.body: TPU 8t — (training, 3x prior-gen compute) and — TPU 8i** (inference, 80% more performance per dollar, native FP4). One superpod = 9,600 chips / 121 exaflops / 2 PB shared memory. Also a $750M corporate AI-adoption fund.******

EPS $0.41 (non-GAAP, beat) / revenue $22.38B (miss). Auto $16.2B (+16% YoY), gross margin 21.1%. — Optimus first-gen factory prep starts in Q2 with a 1M unit/year target. — Model S/X production ends; the Fremont line is repurposed for Optimus. 2026 capex revised up past $25B. — ****

Heartbeat context inheritance and `senderIsOwner` parameter validation gaps allow — sandbox bypass + privilege escalation — . Fixed in 2026.3.31 and later. A wake-up call for LLM agent runtimes generally. — ****

citations.label: The Hacker Wire - OpenClaw Sandbox Bypass CVE-2026-41329

technical.lead: Vercel confirms a supply-chain breach via Context.ai (2026-04-19 to 21)
technical.body: — Context.ai's Google Workspace OAuth tokens were compromised; the attacker pivoted into Vercel's internal environment. The CEO says the attacker showed "stunning speed and deep infrastructure understanding," pointing to AI assistance. The exfiltrated DB went on sale on BreachForums for $2M.

citations.label: The Register - Vercel breach traced to stolen employee creds

technical.lead: Neura Robotics × AWS announce a Physical AI strategic partnership (2026-04-21)
technical.body: Neura's cognitive robotics meets AWS compute. Amazon is — considering deploying in its own FCs (fulfillment centers). — Integrated training / validation / deployment flow on AWS. — ****

citations.label: Robotics & Automation News - Neura + AWS strategic collaboration
